About Girard Contracting and Construction

12+ years serving Fort Worth and surrounding areas

Girard Contracting and Construction started with a simple goal: to provide homeowners in Fort Worth and surrounding areas with exceptional construction services they can depend on. Founded by lifelong Texan, [Founder Name], we’ve grown from a small team to a full-service contractor, always staying true to our local roots.

We believe in clear communication, meticulous attention to detail, and a commitment to exceeding expectations. Our approach is collaborative, working closely with you throughout every phase of your project, from initial design to final walkthrough. We treat every home as if it were our own.

We're proud to be a part of the Fort Worth community, supporting local businesses and organizations. We believe in giving back to the neighborhoods where we live and work, and strive to make a positive impact through our projects and our community involvement.

12+ Years in Business
800+ Projects Completed
97% Client Satisfaction
20+ Team Members
Girard Contracting And Construction

Trusted general contractor professionals serving Fort Worth, TX and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
